## Verification

- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile backend/app/main.py`
- [ ] `cd frontend && pnpm build`
- [ ] Relevant backend/frontend tests, if this changes behavior

## Checklist

- [ ] No API keys, cookies, personal data, or local runtime files are included
- [ ] No unrelated refactor or generated output is included
- [ ] Documentation or `.env.example` is updated if configuration changed
- [ ] Third-party platform behavior is gated and fails gracefully
